title: Trump lashes out at CNN's Kaitlan Collins again for 'never' smiling
shortDescription: Just after answering a question about the “anti-weaponization fund," Trump berated both CNN and correspondent Kaitlan Collins, calling them "corrupt."

title: Why did Washington DC Mayor Bowser call out the mayoral frontrunner?
shortDescription: Muriel Bowser criticized five DC Council members, including Janeese Lewis George, for refusing to support the extension of the city's youth curfew.

title: Trump critic John Bolton reaches plea deal in documents case
shortDescription: Former National Security Adviser John Bolton has reached a plea deal in the criminal case over his handling of documents.

title: Fetterman flips on eliminating filibuster for sake of minority voice
shortDescription: While U.S. Sen. John Fetterman (D-PA) campaigned on eliminating the filibuster in 2022, now he says he's for it. Here's why he changed his opinion.

title: Steak 'n Shake celebrates after MAHA newcomer beats Trump frontrunner
shortDescription: Steak 'n Shake, the MAHA-aligned fast-food chain, celebrated a MAHA candidate's primary win over a Trump-backed incumbent congressman.

title: Trump blasts 'bad Republicans' who voted against Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump bashed the four House Republicans who sided with Democrats to support ending the Iran war.

title: For Trump, the setbacks keep piling up before birthday bash, midterms
shortDescription: A series of setbacks for Trump with Republicans in Congress and in the courts have plagued a president already struggling in polls.

title: Trump says he will nominate Todd Blanche for AG on permanent basis
shortDescription: President Trump said he plans to nominate Acting AG Todd Blanche, his former personal attorney, to permanently lead the Justice Department.

title: Firing some federal employees just got easier with this Trump EO
shortDescription: About 97% of reclassified positions are among the highest-ranking career positions such as directors, chiefs of staff and senior advisers.

title: Trump slams Kaitlan Collins's 'hatred' to her face
shortDescription: President Donald Trump attacked CNN's Kaitlan Collins, saying she has "hatred in her eyes."

title: 'Tragic' MARTA stabbings prompt investigation from Trump Administration
shortDescription: Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy announced an investigation Thursday into a series of stabbings on MARTA, Atlanta's public transit.

title: House votes to end Iran war
shortDescription: The Republican-led House of Representatives voted 215-208 to end the Iran war. Four Republicans joined Democrats in the vote.

title: Trump bashed the Obama Presidential Center. So they invited him on a tour
shortDescription: Trump frequently criticizes former President Barack Obama, and he has had some choice words for the new center. So the Obama folks invited him on a tour.

title: Most Americans think Supreme Court usually backs Trump: Poll
shortDescription: A new poll finds 6 in 10 adults believe the Supreme Court rules for President Trump most of the time despite a big loss with potentially more coming.

title: Voters in Southern California city favor permanent data centers ban
shortDescription: The resounding support by Monterrey Park, California, voters comes after months of protest from residents, who raised concerns over the proposal.

title: Some GOP states declare June ‘Nuclear Family Month’
shortDescription: Several GOP-led states designate June as "Nuclear Family Month," drawing criticism from LGBTQ+ advocates celebrating Pride Month.

title: President Trump continues renovation efforts
shortDescription: USA TODAY's Michelle Del Rey shares the status of President Trump's renovation projects at the White House and across Washington, D.C.

title: Trump: Iran deal could be reached this weekend
shortDescription: President Trump hinted that a deal with Iran could be reached as soon as this weekend as questions swirl around potential breaches of the ceasefire.

title: House votes to end war in Iran in rebuff of Trump
shortDescription: In a rebuff of Trump, the House voted for the first time to end the war in Iran. Four Republicans joined with Democrats to support the resolution.

title: Mullin, Democrats trade barbs in tense DHS funding hearing in Congress
shortDescription: What started as a hearing focused on congressional funding turned into heated exchanges over court orders, private jets and allegations of racism.

title: Top Texas election official to resign ahead of November elections
shortDescription: Jane Nelson, Texas' Secretary of State, announced she will resign July 17 — four months before voters head to the polls in the November general election.

title: See Trump’s growing list of construction projects in DC
shortDescription: Between a 250-foot arch and a 90,000-square-foot ballroom, Trump has big reno plans for the White House and DC. Here's a look.

title: Trump may keep UFC arena outside WH permanently
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the UFC arena recently installed on the White House lawn could remain up permanently after the June 14 fight is over.
